news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% in a Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana's DeFi total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano Plutus V4 升级路线图公布
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG 发布 Plutus V4 技术路线图，预计 2026 年 Q3 上线主网，将增强智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, promising stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group has released a draft proposing a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for small transfers.
